description_long: This ornate fountain stands on a square base with a single, robust pedestal supporting a circular basin. Atop the basin, a sculptural arrangement features several cherubic figures and birds, all clustered around a central, tree-like structure adorned with floral motifs. The figures are highly detailed, with expressive poses and delicate features, and the birds appear to be perched or in flight, adding a sense of movement. The basin itself is rimmed and slightly raised, with a smooth, classical design that contrasts with the intricate upper sculpture. The color palette is primarily a mix of white, beige, and brown, giving the fountain an antique, marble-like appearance. The overall style is reminiscent of Baroque or Rococo garden fountains, emphasizing decorative artistry and naturalistic forms.
description: An ornate, classical fountain with cherubic figures and birds atop a circular basin, supported by a single pedestal on a square base. The fountain features intricate sculptural details and a harmonious blend of white, beige, and brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing two cherubic figures and a bird, with the central sculptural cluster clearly visible atop the basin.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sculptural arrangement and the layered floral and bird motifs.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back of the cherubic figures and the central tree-like structure, revealing more of the basin's rim.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the dynamic poses of the figures and the three-dimensionality of the decorative elements.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is richly decorated with cherubic figures, birds, and a central tree-like structure covered in floral motifs. The figures are sculpted in dynamic, playful poses, and the birds add a sense of liveliness. The overall style is highly detailed and classical, reminiscent of Baroque or Rococo art.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular with a raised, smooth rim and sits atop a single, sturdy pedestal. It appears to be a single tier with no visible compartments or divisions.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the images.
